title: BEM-840 verify Claude auth
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
txt=read(wf)
invalid_with='claude_code_oauth_token:' in txt
has_env='CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN' in txt
has_anthropic_key='ANTHROPIC_API_KEY' in txt or 'anthropic_api_key:' in txt
has_action='anthropics/claude-code-action@' in txt
if invalid_with:
    status='invalid_with_auth_param_still_present'
    next_action='remove invalid with claude_code_oauth_token from dispatcher workflow'
elif has_action and (has_env or has_anthropic_key):
    status='claude_auth_fix_present_dispatch_queued'
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_claude_dispatch_after_auth_fix.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 dispatch Claude after auth fix from internal auditor diagnosis','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    next_action='fresh tick to process dispatch queue, then verify dispatch-result/runtime/real-response'
else:
    status='claude_auth_fix_unclear'
    next_action='patch dispatcher auth wiring explicitly'
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'dispatcher_exists':wf.exists(),'has_claude_action':has_action,'invalid_with_claude_code_oauth_token':invalid_with,'has_env_claude_code_oauth_token':has_env,'has_anthropic_key_reference':has_anthropic_key,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_verify_claude_auth_fix_and_queue.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_verify_claude_auth_fix_and_queue.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Verify Claude Auth Fix And Queue | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. No manual Run workflow.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem840_verify_claude_auth_fix_and_queue.json','governance/reports/bem840_verify_claude_auth_fix_and_queue.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if status=='claude_auth_fix_present_dispatch_queued': changed.append('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_claude_dispatch_after_auth_fix.json')
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Verified Claude dispatcher auth wiring from Claude diagnosis and queued dispatcher run without operator UI')
"""
No issue comments.
